parents.subject: LU-9642 osc: Add kernel doc style for OSC (1)

commit.subject: LU-18448 llite: disable dir read on open by default
commit.message:
LU-18448 llite: disable dir read on open by default

Disable the new dir read on open feature by default, until test
failures related to this feature on aarch64 are fixed.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity clientarch=aarch64
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity clientarch=aarch64
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity clientarch=aarch64
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity clientarch=aarch64
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity clientarch=aarch64
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity clientarch=aarch64
Fixes: e13f17ce3a ("LU-18448 llite: read dir on open fixes")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: Ia012f02695d7ae2694bda5c60019e76c9e040a4a
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63451
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Tested-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
